users.Name: users
users.Comment: User account information. Don't modify its structure as Hasura Auth relies on it to function properly.

refresh_tokens.Name: refresh_tokens
refresh_tokens.Comment: User refresh tokens. Hasura auth uses them to rotate new access tokens as long as the refresh token is not expired. Don't modify its structure as Hasura Auth relies on it to function properly.

roles.Name: roles
roles.Comment: Persistent Hasura roles for users. Don't modify its structure as Hasura Auth relies on it to function properly.

providers.Name: providers
providers.Comment: List of available Oauth providers. Don't modify its structure as Hasura Auth relies on it to function properly.

user_security_keys.Name: user_security_keys
user_security_keys.Comment: User webauthn security keys. Don't modify its structure as Hasura Auth relies on it to function properly.

user_providers.Name: user_providers
user_providers.Comment: Active providers for a given user. Don't modify its structure as Hasura Auth relies on it to function properly.

provider_requests.Name: provider_requests
provider_requests.Comment: Oauth requests, inserted before redirecting to the provider's site. Don't modify its structure as Hasura Auth relies on it to function properly.

user_roles.Name: user_roles
user_roles.Comment: Roles of users. Don't modify its structure as Hasura Auth relies on it to function properly.
